title: デビュー戦の後に・まずは一歩

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Sakura Chiyono O begins to
reflect on what she needs to improve as well as
what skills she can utilize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to accomplish her dream of winning the
Derby, she decides to run in a G1 race—the Asahi
Hai Futurity Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not long after, she tells her friends Yaeno Muteki
and Mejiro Ardan about her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, eager to see the moment Sakura
Chiyono O bares her fangs in a race, says she'll go
watch her at the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.
